summary.headline: Bunge entered into a Term Loan Agreement for $2 billion to fund its acquisition of Viterra Limited.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Global SA, through its subsidiary Bunge Limited Finance Corp., entered into a Term Loan Agreement with lenders including Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation. The agreement provides term loans totaling $2 billion to finance the acquisition of Viterra Limited and cover related expenses.

extraction_notes: Numbers and amounts are not provided in the filing, only the agreement details were extracted.
